# UC-14.10.4 · Aranet Rapid Pressure Change Detection

## Description

Step changes in pressure accompany doors, windows, or HVAC failures; useful in cleanrooms and pressure-stabilized labs.

## Value

Speeds diagnosis of envelope breaches and fan failures.

## Implementation

(1) 1–5 minute ingestion. (2) Tune hPa delta. (3) Suppress known door events via schedule.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-6h
| eval p=tonumber(coalesce(pressure_hpa, pressure, ""))
| streamstats window=2 global=f earliest(p) as p_prev by sensor_id
| eval dp=abs(p-p_prev)
| where dp>1.5
| table _time sensor_id location p dp
```

## Visualization

Scatter of dp; timeline.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
